title: Talbot Ridges
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Talbot Ridges''' were a mountain ridge on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brosi]], to the west of [[Forest Valley]]. It was said that [[Randle Clanse]] was born in a small village near the Talbot Ridges. The Talbot Ridges were in the influence area of the [[Brosin Underground]] around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
